top_signals.title: French BTC treasury firm Capital B developing STRC-style bitcoin credit instrument
top_signals.summary: Capital B is developing a digital credit instrument similar to Strategy's STRC and Strive's SATA.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SpaceX gains 9% in premarket trading as momentum builds
top_signals.summary: CEO Elon Musk said Sunday that the company "might be able to reach approximately" $1 trillion revenue in 2030."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
